title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shiprocket

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Shiprocket
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
